title: Reflexion: Language Agents with Verbal Reinforcement Learning
snippet: Framework enabling LLMs to learn through linguistic feedback rather than weight updates. Agents verbally reflect on task feedback signals and maintain reflective text in episodic memory. NeurIPS 2023.

metadata.llm_reason: The seed paper itself - foundational reference for the citation query

title: Robust Verbal Reinforcement Learning for Language Agents
snippet: Enhances Reflexion using vector-backed memory for scalable retrieval and quality-filtering pipelines to prevent contaminated reflections, achieving 82% accuracy on HotPotQA and 97.01% success on AlfWorld.

metadata.llm_reason: Directly extends Reflexion with improved memory architecture

title: MemOrb: Plug-and-Play Verbal-Reinforcement Memory Layer
snippet: Lightweight memory layer distilling multi-turn interactions into strategy reflections for customer service agents, achieving 63 percentage-point gains without fine-tuning.

metadata.llm_reason: Directly builds on Reflexion verbal reinforcement concept

title: OPTAGENT: Optimizing Multi-Agent LLM Interactions
snippet: Multi-agent verbal reinforcement learning framework dynamically constructing collaboration structures with feedback mechanisms.

metadata.llm_reason: Extends verbal reinforcement to multi-agent collaboration

title: FinCon: Synthesized LLM Multi-Agent System with Conceptual Verbal Reinforcement
snippet: Multi-agent framework using conceptual verbal reinforcement with manager-analyst hierarchies for financial decision-making.

metadata.llm_reason: Applies Reflexion verbal reinforcement to financial domain

title: MAR: Multi-Agent Reflexion Improves Reasoning Abilities in LLMs
snippet: Structured multi-agent extension of Reflexion incorporating diverse reasoning personas and a judge model. Improves HotPotQA exact-match by 3 points.

metadata.llm_reason: Direct multi-agent extension of Reflexion with benchmark improvements

title: Experiential Reflective Learning for Self-Improving LLM Agents
snippet: Uses Reflexion algorithm for collecting success and failure experiences. Builds pool of reusable heuristics. ICLR 2026 MemAgents Workshop.

metadata.llm_reason: Directly uses Reflexion as base algorithm

title: Self-reflection enhances large language models towards substantial academic response
snippet: Dual-loop reflection method inspired by metacognition. Reflections stored in a reflection bank. Nature npj Artificial Intelligence.

metadata.llm_reason: Extends Reflexion concept of self-reflection to academic domain

title: Self-Reflection in LLM Agents: Effects on Problem-Solving Performance
snippet: Empirical study examining the effects of self-reflection in LLM agents on problem-solving.

metadata.llm_reason: Directly studies the Reflexion mechanism empirically

title: Language Agent Tree Search (LATS) Unifies Reasoning, Acting, and Planning
snippet: General framework synergizing LM capabilities. Combines reflection/evaluation and Monte-Carlo tree search. Builds on Reflexion.

metadata.llm_reason: LATS directly builds on Reflexion adding tree search

title: noahshinn/reflexion - GitHub repository
snippet: Official implementation of Reflexion: Language Agents with Verbal Reinforcement Learning. NeurIPS 2023.

metadata.llm_reason: Official implementation repo

title: Hindsight is 20/20: Building Agent Memory that Retains, Recalls, and Reflects
snippet: Agent memory framework combining retention, recall, and reflection. Discovered via curated paper list.

metadata.llm_reason: Extends Reflexion reflection concept with structured memory retention and recall

title: MemRL: Self-Evolving Agents via Runtime Reinforcement Learning on Episodic Memory
snippet: Self-evolving agents using runtime RL on episodic memory. Combines Reflexion-style reflection with RL.

metadata.llm_reason: Directly extends Reflexion episodic memory with runtime RL

title: ReasoningBank: Scaling Agent Self-Evolving with Reasoning Memory
snippet: Scales agent self-evolution with reasoning memory banks. Extends episodic memory to structured reasoning traces.

metadata.llm_reason: Extends Reflexion memory concept to structured reasoning at scale

title: Reflect, Retry, Reward: Self-Improving LLMs via Reinforcement Learning
snippet: Self-improving LLMs using the reflect-retry-reward loop inspired by Reflexion, combined with reinforcement learning.

metadata.llm_reason: Directly extends Reflexion reflect-retry paradigm with RL rewards

title: GEPA: Reflective Prompt Evolution Can Outperform Reinforcement Learning
snippet: Shows that reflective prompt evolution can match or exceed RL for agent improvement.

metadata.llm_reason: Extends Reflexion insight that verbal feedback can rival RL

title: RAGEN: Understanding Self-Evolution in LLM Agents via Multi-Turn Reinforcement Learning
snippet: Studies self-evolution in LLM agents through multi-turn RL, analyzing how agents learn from interaction trajectories.

metadata.llm_reason: Studies the self-evolution mechanism Reflexion pioneered

title: Darwin Godel Machine: Open-Ended Evolution of Self-Improving Agents
snippet: Open-ended evolution framework for self-improving agents. Extends Reflexion self-improvement to open-ended evolution.

metadata.llm_reason: Extends Reflexion self-improvement to fully open-ended evolutionary agents

title: SkillWeaver: Web Agents can Self-Improve by Discovering and Honing Skills
snippet: Web agents that self-improve by discovering and refining skills through experience.

metadata.llm_reason: Applies Reflexion self-improvement paradigm to web agent skill learning

title: Agent-Pro: Learning to Evolve via Policy-Level Reflection and Optimization
snippet: Agent that learns to evolve through policy-level reflection, extending Reflexion from action-level to policy-level.

metadata.llm_reason: Directly extends Reflexion from action reflection to policy-level reflection

title: AgentGym: Evolving Large Language Model-based Agents across Diverse Environments
snippet: Framework for evolving LLM agents across diverse environments with training and optimization.

metadata.llm_reason: Agent evolution framework building on Reflexion lineage

title: Agent-Memory-Paper-List: Memory in the Age of AI Agents survey
snippet: Curated paper list (1675 stars) for the survey Memory in the Age of AI Agents. References Reflexion as foundational in agent memory.

metadata.llm_reason: Survey paper list referencing Reflexion as foundational

title: LLM-Agent-Paper-List: The Rise and Potential of LLM-Based Agents survey
snippet: 8091-star paper list from the 86-page survey. References Reflexion in memory, planning, and social behavior sections.

metadata.llm_reason: Major survey paper list (8k stars) organizing Reflexion follow-up work

title: Awesome-Self-Improving-Agents: Self-Improvement in FM-Based Agentic Systems
snippet: Curated list of 238 papers on self-improving agents. Reflexion listed in Qualitative-Feedback Refinement section.

metadata.llm_reason: Comprehensive paper list organizing Reflexion lineage across 238 papers

title: Reflecting on Reflexion - by Noah Shinn and Ashwin Gopinath
snippet: Blog post by the original authors reflecting on the Reflexion framework and its impact.

metadata.llm_reason: Author blog post providing additional context on Reflexion impact

title: Symbolic Learning Enables Self-Evolving Agents
snippet: Enables self-evolving agents through symbolic learning, connecting Reflexion verbal feedback to formal symbolic representations.

metadata.llm_reason: Connects Reflexion verbal feedback paradigm to symbolic learning

title: CORE: A cognitive science-inspired framework for task-adaptive reasoning enhancement in LLMs
snippet: Cognitive science-inspired framework for task-adaptive reasoning enhancement. Cites Reflexion.

metadata.llm_reason: Recent 2026 paper citing Reflexion for reasoning enhancement

title: Trace2Skill: Distill Trajectory-Local Lessons into Transferable Agent Skills
snippet: Framework enabling LLM agents to acquire domain-specific skills through analyzing execution experience.

metadata.llm_reason: Extends Reflexion idea of learning from execution traces to skill acquisition
